name: video-share
description: Drop-in 'share to feed / story / DM' modal. Accepts a ShareSource (gallery item, external mediaUrl, or batch) and posts to social-feed, stories-with-ttl, or direct-messaging behind one consistent UI.

providesContract.description: Default export is the modal component. ShareSource is the polymorphic source descriptor (gallery item via galleryItemId, or external mediaUrl + mediaType + previewUrl).

endpoints./api/feed: POST { content?, mediaUrl?, mediaType?, sourceRef? } — provided by social-feed module
endpoints./api/stories: POST { mediaUrl, mediaType, sourceRef? } — provided by stories-with-ttl module
endpoints./api/dms: POST { recipient_id, content?, mediaUrl?, mediaType? } — provided by direct-messaging module
endpoints./api/channels: GET — provided by channel-management module (optional; gracefully degrades to empty list)

postInstall: 1. Make sure social-feed, stories-with-ttl and direct-messaging modules are installed (and channel-management if you want channel-posting)
2. The modal expects an Avatar component at @/components/Avatar — included as an optional file; replace with your own if you have one
3. Drop the modal into any feature that wants 'share to feed': pass open + source + onClose + onShared
